mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, definition_id, business_key, title, initiator_id, status, current_task_id, started_at, ended_at, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from wf_process_instance
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from wf_process_instance
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into wf_process_instance (id, tenant_id, definition_id, business_key, title, initiator_id, status, current_task_id, started_at, ended_at, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, payload ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initiatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payload,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into wf_process_instance
id,
tenant_id,
definition_id,
business_key,
title,
initiator_id,
status,
current_task_id,
started_at,
ended_at,
create_time,
update_time,
create_by,
update_by,
payload,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{payload,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update wf_process_instance
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
definition_id = #{row.definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
business_key = #{row.businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{row.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
initiator_id = #{row.initiatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
current_task_id = #{row.currentTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
started_at = #{row.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ended_at = #{row.endedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payload = #{row.payload,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update wf_process_instance set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, definition_id = #{row.definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, business_key = #{row.businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{row.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, initiator_id = #{row.initiatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_task_id = #{row.currentTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, started_at = #{row.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ended_at = #{row.endedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payload = #{row.payload,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update wf_process_instance set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, definition_id = #{row.definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, business_key = #{row.businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{row.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, initiator_id = #{row.initiatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_task_id = #{row.currentTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, started_at = #{row.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ended_at = #{row.endedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update wf_process_instance
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
definition_id = #{definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
business_key = #{businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
initiator_id = #{initiatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
current_task_id = #{currentTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
started_at = #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ended_at = #{endedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payload = #{payload,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update wf_process_instance set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, definition_id = #{definitionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, business_key = #{businessKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, initiator_id = #{initiatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_task_id = #{currentTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, started_at = #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ended_at = #{endedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payload = #{payload,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
